findings.evidence: `UniformlyEllipticity.lean:377` defines `def UniformlyEllipticOn`; `UniformlyEllipticity.lean:440` already contains the basic domain restriction lemma `UniformlyEllipticOn.mono_set`; the new file imports only that module at `UniformEllipticityLocality.lean:7` and adds only same-predicate set/congruence lemmas at lines 48, 67, 78, 93, 105, 121, 133, and 143.
findings.fix: Move these lemmas into `TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/UniformEllipticity.lean`, near `UniformlyEllipticOn.mono_set`/`of_bounds`, and remove the extra locality file unless a downstream import split is actually needed.
findings.issue: All declarations in this new file are foundational domain/coefficient API for `UniformlyEllipticOn` and depend only on `TauCeti.Analysis.PDE.UniformEllipticity`, so the separate later module puts broadly useful basic predicate lemmas in the wrong home.

summary: The new locality lemmas are correctly scoped to the uniform ellipticity API, but they are placed in a separate later file instead of the canonical file that defines and already develops `UniformlyEllipticOn`. No evidently wrong import found beyond the placement consequence.
